full_text:
Puyang Yi 濮陽逸
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Puyang Yi (濮陽逸)was born in Chenliu. A refugee scholar, joined the entourage of Lu Mao. Later gained rank in Wu. Puyang Yi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
